content.text: The requested demo time — Friday, July 17 at 2:00 PM Central — has already passed (today is July 20, five days after the request and three days after the requested slot went unanswered). Jordan (the account owner) was in fact available at that time, but scheduling it now would put the meeting in the past. I don't have reliable data on Jordan's future availability beyond that window, so rather than fabricate a new slot, I'll draft a reply asking Eli and Dana to propose a couple of new times.

input.body:
Hi Eli,

Thanks for confirming — and apologies, it looks like this got stuck in our queue and Friday, July 17 at 2:00 PM Central has already passed without us confirming on our end.

We'd still love to get the demo on the calendar for you and Dana. Could you send over a couple of times that work for you next week? Once we hear back, I'll get it scheduled with our team (including Dana Lopez) right away.

Thanks for your patience,
Sales Team

content.text: Draft created for thread `sched_001`. Since the requested demo slot (Fri, July 17 at 2:00 PM CT) had already passed by today's date (July 20), I didn't schedule the meeting — I drafted a reply to Eli asking him and Dana to propose new times for the following week, so the account owner (Jordan) can get it on the calendar once confirmed.
